title: AI Developer - LLM Applications
company_focus:
Technology consulting firm delivering AI solutions across
industries
description:
Reaktor's award-winning tech community is looking for AI
developers to join us in Amsterdam.

If you thrive on applying cutting-edge AI technologies,
building LLM-powered applications, and driving projects
through the full software development lifecycle — and you’re
passionate about solving real human problems with a holistic
approach — we’d love to meet you. Join us to experience a
truly collaborative, low-hierarchy environment where your
curiosity and ideas can make a real impact.

As an AI Developer at Reaktor, your job is to be an expert
in a range of AI-related software development
responsibilities spanning the entire software development
lifecycle, from front-end to production.

 Your daily tasks include:

- Designing and implementing end-to-end LLM-enabled
  applications from backend architecture to user-facing
  components, ensuring scalability and maintainability.
- Integrating commercial and open source LLMs (e.g. OpenAI,
  Anthropic, Meta Llama etc.) into production applications
  and workflows, using APIs or fine-tuning.
- Working with end-to-end RAG pipelines, including embeddings,
  vector databases (e.g. PostgreSQL + pgvector, chromaDB,
  pinecone), robust prompt engineering strategies and
  guardrails
- Designing and implementing evaluation pipelines to benchmark
  the model performance and safety
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams, contributing to
  the development of AI use cases to address complex
  business challenges
- Working together with the client’s tech and business teams
  and helping them to pick the right technologies suitable
  for their needs.
- Delivering the client and the team with world-class
  technical expertise.
- Other software development-related tasks like contributing
  to the overall software architecture and design, building
  test automation and debugging problems.

You are a curious-minded AI developer who is comfortable
working with LLMs, backend, and front-end of an application.
Additionally, you understand the role of infrastructure and
understand the underlying workings of transformer-based
models.

To thrive in this position, you’ll need:

- Experience working with AI software development technologies
  (LLMs, backend, frontend, ops, and consulting skills) in a
  production environment.
- Experience in deploying AI applications in cloud
  environments (Azure, AWS, GCP) with
  containerization/orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
- We don’t have a hard limit on years of experience, but we’ve
  noticed that some of these competencies take several years
  to accumulate.
- Foundational knowledge in DevOps, including Continuous
  Integration (CI), automated deployment, and test
  automation.
- Know-how on vector databases and databases (e.g., PostgreSQL
  + pgvector, pgvectorscale, chromaDB, pinecone).
- Awareness of data privacy (GDPR), security and ethical
  considerations when handling sensitive data with AI.
- To be comfortable engaging with the client stakeholders when
  needed.
- Fluent verbal & written English skills. Local language
  skills (Dutch) are seen as an advantage.

RE: Technologies in our projects

- Some projects require proficiency in Python or
  Node.js/TypeScript, including experience with frameworks
  like LangChain, FastAPI or LlamaIndex.
- Some projects require JVM-based languages.
- Our philosophy is that tech is a tool. This role is quite
  new to the industry and there will be some grey areas when
  it comes to exact techs in our projects. Do not let lack
  of a specific technology hinder you from applying to this
  job.

Why join us?

For two decades, we’ve been developing qualities and
capabilities for adapting, reacting, and supporting change –
building Reaktor to hold up in a fast-paced environment
while ensuring the well-being of our people.

At Reaktor, you'll have the opportunity to work across a
range of industries, such as Healthcare, the Public Sector,
Industrial and Retail. You might also be collaborating with
clients in Defense & Security, Aero or Gaming &
Entertainment.

Read more about the different industries we work with here.

While working at Reaktor, we’ll provide you with:

- The ability to impact how you work. Together with the
  client, your team chooses the approach, technologies, and
  methodologies you think will work best in any given
  situation.
- A community with as much support as your heart desires.
- A team that’s not only experienced but considerate as well –
  they all want you to succeed.
- A sustainable work-life balance and support for your daily
  life outside of work. (e.g., free moving day, Reaktor car
  share, sick child care services, office space to use for
  your private events, etc.).
- An opportunity to grow as a professional. In addition to the
  day-to-day work, we offer internal training courses,
  community events, and 15-minute coffee breaks to discuss
  hot topics in tech and design.
- A possibility to take part in more extended academy-like
  studies like Cloud Academy.
- 300+ hobby clubs, from winter swimming and running to
  knitting and archery, that bring people together outside
  of (and sometimes inside) office hours. Many of these are
  supported by Reaktor.
- Check more about our benefits & perks on
  www.reaktor.com/careers

Diversity, equity, and inclusion

Together, we are committed to making Reaktor an environment
that embraces and values all of our employees for the whole
of who they are. We encourage applicants from all
backgrounds to apply, knowing that studies show that members
of underrepresented communities don’t apply for jobs unless
they fully satisfy all of the requirements. If you're
thinking twice about applying for this reason, we invite you
to send us your application anyway. You could be just the
person we're looking for.

Read more about our DEI work here.

Interested? Drop us a line – We'll be happy to hear from
you!
responsibilities: Design and implement end-to-end LLM-enabled applications from backend to user-facing components
Integrate commercial and open source LLMs into production applications using APIs or fine-tuning
Build end-to-end RAG pipelines including embeddings, vector databases, prompt engineering and guardrails
Design and implement evaluation pipelines to benchmark model performance and safety
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop AI use cases for complex business challenges
Advise clients on technology selection and deliver technical expertise
Contribute to software architecture, test automation and debugging
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying LLM-
powered applications, working with RAG pipelines, fine-
tuning models, and implementing end-to-end AI solutions. The
developer works hands-on with LLMs, vector databases, and
evaluation pipelines for production AI systems.
